name: Apple Cream Cheese Pie
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 cups peeled and thinly sliced apples
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix together the apple slices, 3/4 cup sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg.
2. Arrange the mixture in the pastry shell.
3. Sprinkle chopped walnuts over the apples.
4. Bake in a preheated 450°F oven for 15 minutes.
5. Turn off the heat and lower the temperature to 325°F.
6. In a separate bowl, cream together the remaining sugar, salt, and cream cheese until smooth.
7. Add the beaten eggs to the mixture and mix until well combined.
8. Stir in the cream and vanilla, mixing until everything is well incorporated.
9. Pour the creamy filling over the apples in the pie shell.
10. Bake at 325°F for an additional 40 minutes.
